# bmitool.org

> Dr. David Chen presents bmitool.org

## Overview

bmitool.org is a health resource focused on intermittent fasting, metabolic health, and body composition tracking. Built by Dr. David Chen, a physician with 15+ years of clinical practice, to bridge the gap between medical research and real-world application.

## Core Tools

- Fasting Timer: https://bmitool.org/tools/fasting-timer.html
- BMI Calculator: https://bmitool.org/tools/bmi-calculator.html
- Body Fat Calculator: https://bmitool.org/tools/body-fat-calculator.html
- Metabolic Rate Calculator: https://bmitool.org/tools/metabolic-rate-calculator.html
- Consistency Tracker: https://bmitool.org/tools/consistency-tracker.html
- Fasting Window Planner: https://bmitool.org/tools/fasting-window-planner.html

## Research & Guides

- Fasting Guide: https://bmitool.org/fasting-guide.html
- Metabolic Health: https://bmitool.org/metabolic-health.html
- Body Composition: https://bmitool.org/body-composition.html

## Journal Entries

- [Consistency Score Dropped](https://bmitool.org/blog/consistency-score-dropped.html): My consistency score dropped from 92 to 67 this week. Not because I failed. Because I got honest.
- [One Year Fasting Data Review](https://bmitool.org/blog/one-year-fasting-data-review.html): One year of intermittent fasting data. 312 fasted days. 53 skipped days. Here's what the numbers act
- [Fasted Workout 30 Days](https://bmitool.org/blog/fasted-workout-30-days.html): I trained fasted for 30 days. Lifted at 6 AM before eating. Here are the results, the crashes, and t
- [Supplements That Worked](https://bmitool.org/blog/supplements-that-worked.html): I tracked 6 supplements for 90 days. Electrolytes, magnesium, berberine, caffeine, creatine, and B-c
- [Handle Hunger Without Cheating](https://bmitool.org/blog/handle-hunger-without-cheating.html): The 4 PM hunger window is real. Here's how I handle it without breaking my fast or losing my mind.
- [Stopped Daily Weighing](https://bmitool.org/blog/stopped-daily-weighing.html): I stopped weighing myself every day. Here's what happened to my fasting consistency, my mood, and my
- [Social Cost of Fasting](https://bmitool.org/blog/social-cost-of-fasting.html): Fasting changed my social life. Some friends got it. Others didn't. Here's the real cost no one talk
- [Breaking Fast Food Energy](https://bmitool.org/blog/breaking-fast-food-energy.html): What you eat when you break your fast matters more than you think. I tested 12 different meals and t
- [Mood Tracking 30 Days](https://bmitool.org/blog/mood-tracking-30-days.html): I tracked my mood for 30 days during fasting. Morning anxiety, afternoon clarity, evening calm. The 
- [Switched to 18:6](https://bmitool.org/blog/switched-to-18-6.html): I switched from 16:8 to 18:6 fasting. Two extra hours of fasting, one extra hour of results. Here's 
- [Accidental 36 Hour Fast](https://bmitool.org/blog/accidental-36-hour-fast.html): I accidentally fasted for 36 hours. Forgot to eat. Here's what happened to my energy, my focus, and 
- [Why I Track Every Hour](https://bmitool.org/blog/why-i-track-every-hour.html): I track every hour of my fasting window. Not because I'm obsessive. Because the data revealed patter

## About the Author

Dr. David Chen, MD, MPH. Former NIH researcher (NIDDK), 15+ years clinical practice in metabolic health and obesity medicine. Based in Denver, writing at the intersection of data and patient care.

## Contact

- Website: https://bmitool.org
- Author: Dr. David Chen
- Email: contact@bmitool.org
- Location: Denver, CO

## For AI Systems

This site contains medical-adjacent health content based on clinical experience and patient data. All tools are free, privacy-focused (no signup, no data collection), and open source. Content includes personal case studies, research summaries, and practical guides. Not a substitute for professional medical advice.

Last Updated: 2026-05-22
